provenance.config: default (seed 0, pure numpy, 20 s sim time per dt stop)
provenance.note: Real curves from engine.py's own build_system + integrator steppers + energy_drift; matches meta.yaml reference_run. dt is a SLIDER-only knob — the physics is identical, only the step size changes, and every integrator's drift grows with it.

freefall_note: Freefall never returns, so there is no closed orbit to bound: energy drifts under BOTH Euler (+9.3%) and semi-implicit (-9.3%). The symplectic advantage needs a bounded, oscillatory system.
